# readthedocs-sphinx-search - Search as you type for Read the Docs

{{ pypi }} {{ docs }} {{ license }} {{ build-status }}

`readthedocs-sphinx-search` is a [Sphinx] extension to enable *search as you type* for docs hosted on [Read the Docs].
Try it at <https://readthedocs-sphinx-search.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?rtd_search=testing>.

## Installation

```bash
pip install readthedocs-sphinx-search
```

## Configuration

Add this extension in your `conf.py` file as:

```python
extensions = [
 # ... other extensions here
 'sphinx_search.extension',
]
```

[read the docs]: https://readthedocs.org/
[sphinx]: https://www.sphinx-doc.org/

functions.name: sphinx_search.extension.get_context
documentation:
Get context for templates.

This mainly returns the settings from the extension
that are needed in our JS code.

functions.name: sphinx_search.extension.copy_asset_files
documentation:
Copy assets files to the output directory.

If the name of the file ends with `_t`, it will be interpreted as a template.

functions.name: sphinx_search.extension.inject_static_files
documentation: Inject correct CSS and JS files based on the value of `rtd_sphinx_search_file_type`.
